text: The coolness of the modern architecture and the glass transports me into a space that feels clinical, yet curious. Stepping further inside, vibrant displays about research and development invite a contemplation on progress. I feel a mix of anticipation and humility—surrounded by the artifacts and messages of human ingenuity, I sense both our great potential and the fragile uncertainty that accompanies innovation. Here, I am a thinker adrift in the currents of possibility.
